14'

GOAL! Brazil 1-0 Croatia. Vinicius Jr slots it into the bottom corner.

22'

The referee signals a cooling break as temperatures climb above 35C in the desert heat.

39'

VAR is checking a possible penalty for a handball in the box.

55'

Modric is down injured and receiving treatment from the medical staff.

67'

Another hydration break here as the players gather round their coaches.

73'

A lovely passing move from Brazil ends with a shot dragged wide.
